title: Hook a Duck
description: Hook ducks, get tickets, win prizes!
body: [![Explore Mods Button Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8df3ae95ef20a2470bd7009a7a26bd24880b1a86.png)](https://khazoda.com) ![Hook a Duck Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4a9ed02e481bbb383e59fab4323d7ce73286b2f.png) #### Use a **fishing rod** to hook plastic ducks from rivers and shallow oceans and receive tickets and prizes! ![Duck Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iqFGVcca/images/ce5b77d57889c019889030f7111b1a0dd8e70690.png) *Can you catch the elusive rare duck?* ``` This mod was made in 3 weeks for ModFest Carnival. It's not intended for standard / long term survival playthroughs, and long-term support won't be offered. ``` ### Hook a Duck has special interactions with: - [The Magnificent Maw!](https://modrinth.com/mod/magnificent-maw) (Swallow your duck swords!) - [Dream Burst Spirit Vector!](https://modrinth.com/mod/spirit-vector) (Get custom duck-themed spirit vectors) - [Wheel of Whacky!](https://modrinth.com/mod/wheel-of-wacky) (There is a duck-themed prize on the wheel!)
